name: Garbanzo-Oat Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat waffle iron.
2. Place oatmeal in blender and grind into coarse flour.
3. Add all remaining ingredients to the blender. Blend until smooth.
4. Let batter sit for a few minutes.
5. Blend again for 2 seconds.
6. Pour batter into the hot, well-oiled waffle iron.
7. Bake for 5 to 8 minutes.
VARIATION: Replace 1/4 cup water with 1 egg.
